name: Atal Pension Yojana
target_description: Indian citizens aged 18-40 with savings bank accounts, not covered by statutory social security and not income tax payers
ministry: Ministry of Finance, administered through PFRDA
data_source: APY Scheme Details PDF from PFRDA/npscra.nsdl.co.in

rules.description: Applicant must be between 18 and 40 years of age
Applicant must have a savings bank account
Applicant must not be an income tax payer (current or former). From Oct 2022: income tax payers not eligible.
rules.ambiguity_note: From Oct 2022: income tax payers (current or former) NOT eligible.

rules.description: Applicant must not be a member of statutory social security schemes (EPF/NPS-govt/ESIC)
rules.ambiguity_note: Members of statutory social security (EPF/NPS-govt/ESIC) not eligible

benefit_summary: Guaranteed monthly pension ₹1,000-₹5,000 after age 60. Govt co-contribution for eligible subscribers. Spouse gets same pension after subscriber death.

application_offices.find_instruction: Any scheduled commercial bank (SBI, PNB, Bank of Baroda, etc.)

description: Pension savings scheme for unorganised sector workers aged 18–40. The subscriber chooses a pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000/month at age 60. Monthly contribution depends on age and chosen pension level — younger subscribers pay less. Government co-contributes 50% (up to ₹1,000/year) for those who joined before March 2016. In case of premature death, spouse gets the pension; after both die, nominee gets the corpus.
description_hindi: 18 से 40 वर्ष के असंगठित क्षेत्र के कामगार हर महीने छोटी राशि जमा करके 60 वर्ष की उम्र में ₹1,000–5,000/माह की गारंटीशुदा पेंशन पा सकते हैं। जितनी कम उम्र में खाता खुलवाएं, उतनी कम मासिक किस्त। पति/पत्नी की मृत्यु पर जीवनसाथी को पेंशन जारी रहती है। पेंशन की राशि और योगदान की किस्त का विकल्प आप चुनते हैं।
benefit_summary_hindi: ₹1,000–5,000/माह पेंशन, 60 वर्ष के बाद, जीवनभर गारंटीशुदा
